focus: Profile & Identity — Titles + Banners + Nameplates + Rank Badges

items.name: Iron Pilot
items.description: Profile title "Iron Pilot". Quiet old-school callsign, dependable as the alloy.
items.flavor_text: Iron does not flinch. Nothing dramatic about it. Holds together under everything.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile title text styling, Iron Pilot in brushed steel typeface, cold grey with faint rivet detail, stoic old-school

items.name: Silent Saint
items.description: Profile title "Silent Saint". For pilots who never say much and never miss.
items.flavor_text: The saint keeps quiet during combat. The saint keeps quiet afterward, too.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile title text styling, Silent Saint in serif chapel font, white on deep navy with thin halo glyph, reverent

items.name: Glass Cannon
items.description: Profile title "Glass Cannon". High damage, low armor, lived to tell it.
items.flavor_text: The shot landed before anyone decided if it should. Cannon first, apology later.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile title text styling, Glass Cannon in sharp geometric font, crystal white with thin magenta fracture, fragile-aggressive

items.name: Asteroid Hermit
items.description: Profile title "Asteroid Hermit". The pilot who lived in the belt long enough to name rocks.
items.flavor_text: Knows every asteroid by hum and drift. Prefers their company to most others.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile title text styling, Asteroid Hermit in weathered slab font, dusty grey with small rock cluster glyph, recluse

items.name: Deep Void Wanderer
items.description: Profile title "Deep Void Wanderer". For the pilot who prefers the unmapped edges.
items.flavor_text: The chart ran out. The pilot kept going. Somewhere the stars kept score.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile title text styling, Deep Void Wanderer in narrow condensed font, deep navy with thin starfield underline, solitary

items.name: Reactor Riot
items.description: Profile title "Reactor Riot". For the pilot whose engine-room decisions become squadron lore.
items.flavor_text: The reactor had opinions. The pilot had more. Nobody won that argument cleanly.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile title text styling, Reactor Riot in bold stencil font, high-vis orange with small warning triangle glyph, chaotic

items.name: Warp Whisperer
items.description: Profile title "Warp Whisperer". Some pilots talk to warp gates. Some are talked back to.
items.flavor_text: The gate answers back sometimes. The pilot never asks what it said out loud.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile title text styling, Warp Whisperer in soft italic serif, lavender with thin gate-arch glyph underline, mystic

items.name: Void Dancer
items.description: Profile title "Void Dancer". For pilots whose maneuvers look less flown than choreographed.
items.flavor_text: Every dodge a small bow. The opponent never realized the duel was a duet.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile title text styling, Void Dancer in graceful script font, silver with small crescent-arc underline glyph, elegant

items.name: Dusk Rider
items.description: Profile title "Dusk Rider". The pilot who takes patrols on the terminator of every planet.
items.flavor_text: Flies only when the sky changes its mind. Nobody asks which mind.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile title text styling, Dusk Rider in western-style slab font, burnt orange fading to violet, lonely romantic

items.name: Rust Raider
items.description: Profile title "Rust Raider". For the pilot who knows every scrap-belt by the smell of hot oxide.
items.flavor_text: Salvage is honest work. The pilot tries not to think about whose salvage.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile title text styling, Rust Raider in chipped stencil font, oxidized copper with small crescent wrench glyph, gritty

items.name: Long Watch
items.description: Profile title "Long Watch". For pilots who know the 16-hour patrol by heart.
items.flavor_text: The watch ends when the watch ends. Not a minute sooner. Not a minute asked.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile title text styling, Long Watch in clean military serif, faded khaki with small clock-face glyph, patient

items.name: Scrap Baron
items.description: Profile title "Scrap Baron". Runs the hulls nobody else will touch, profitably.
items.flavor_text: Bought the wreckage for a song. Sang the song better, sold everything twice.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile title text styling, Scrap Baron in heavy chiseled font, dark bronze with small crown glyph, proud and gritty

items.name: Night Shift
items.description: Profile title "Night Shift". For the pilot who owns every hour after the dock lights dim.
items.flavor_text: Daylight pilots never know what happens out here. Night shift pilots never tell.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile title text styling, Night Shift in narrow industrial font, deep blue with small dim-bulb glyph underline, quiet vigilance

items.name: Free Run
items.description: Profile title "Free Run". For pilots who picked the ship over the contract and never regretted either.
items.flavor_text: No chain to a flag. No flag to a planet. Still pays fuel.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile title text styling, Free Run in stylish italic sans, warm white with small open-chain glyph, independent

items.name: The Unkillable
items.description: Profile title "The Unkillable". For the pilot who limped home from duels nobody survived.
items.flavor_text: Some pilots should not be alive. They stay alive anyway. Purely out of spite.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile title text styling, The Unkillable in scarred bold font, blood red with small cracked heart glyph, defiant

items.name: Deadshot
items.description: Profile title "Deadshot". For pilots whose first trigger pull is the only trigger pull needed.
items.flavor_text: Takes one shot. Needs one shot. The math has been checked twice.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile title text styling, Deadshot in clean military stencil, high-contrast white on black with small crosshair glyph, precise

items.name: Phantom Ace
items.description: Profile title "Phantom Ace". For pilots reported dead three times before the first combat sortie.
items.flavor_text: Records list several deaths. Records list several kills. Records stopped asking.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile title text styling, Phantom Ace in ghosted italic font, pale blue with faint ghost-plane glyph, elusive legendary-ace

items.name: Apex Predator
items.description: Profile title "Apex Predator". For pilots who never see their own back except in photos.
items.flavor_text: The food chain has a top. This title claims to be there. Most agree quietly.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile title text styling, Apex Predator in heavy aggressive slab, blood red with small fang glyph underline, dominant

items.name: Nebula Prophet
items.description: Profile title "Nebula Prophet". For the pilot who reads nebula shifts like scripture.
items.flavor_text: The nebula told the pilot something important. The pilot is still translating.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile title text styling, Nebula Prophet in mystical serif, violet-pink gradient with small nebula glyph, visionary

items.name: First Wave Veteran
items.description: Profile title "First Wave Veteran". For the pilot in the cockpit before most of the stations were built.
items.flavor_text: Arrived when nobody had a uniform yet. The uniform arrived around the pilot, late.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile title text styling, First Wave Veteran in weathered military serif, faded khaki-gold with small wave chevron glyph, honored

items.name: The Last Stand
items.description: Profile title "The Last Stand". For pilots whose final engagements became squadron posters.
items.flavor_text: Everyone else left. This pilot stayed. The posters arrived a week later.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile title text styling, The Last Stand in bold cracked serif, bronze-gold with small sword-cross glyph, heroic stoic

items.name: Relic Hunter
items.description: Profile title "Relic Hunter". For the pilot who takes the jobs nobody respectable will touch.
items.flavor_text: The relics are real. The danger is real. The paycheck, only sometimes.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile title text styling, Relic Hunter in archaeological engraved font, deep bronze with small glyph cartouche, adventurer

items.name: Voidbreaker
items.description: Profile title "Voidbreaker". For pilots who handle deep-void phenomena like weather reports.
items.flavor_text: Rumored to have flown through a singularity. The pilot does not confirm or deny.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile title text styling, Voidbreaker in shattered angular font, deep purple with small cracked ring glyph, ominous

items.name: Ghost Runner
items.description: Profile title "Ghost Runner". For pilots with the smallest scanner signatures and longest outstanding warrants.
items.flavor_text: Never shows up where expected. Always shows up where needed. Usually.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile title text styling, Ghost Runner in wispy italic serif, pale white with small vanishing-silhouette glyph, elusive

items.name: Starborn
items.description: Profile title "Starborn" with faint animated starlight drifting through the text characters.
items.flavor_text: Born on a ship, between stations, between stars. The name was the only paperwork.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile title text styling, Starborn in elegant serif with animated starlight drifting through characters, epic celestial

items.name: Nebula Banner
items.description: Profile banner: soft purple-pink nebula wash with scattered white star points and a thin gold border strip.
items.flavor_text: The nebula was there first. The banner was cut from an edge the pilot admired.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile banner backdrop, soft purple-pink nebula wash with scattered white star points and thin gold border strip, cosmic warm

items.name: Void Black Banner
items.description: Profile banner: pure deep-void black with a single thin silver horizon line and muted title caption area.
items.flavor_text: Black on black. The pilot prefers the simplicity. The profile page agrees.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile banner backdrop, pure deep void black with single thin silver horizon line, minimalist void aesthetic

items.name: Arctic Blue Banner
items.description: Profile banner: pale arctic blue with faint frost vein pattern and a thin chrome accent at the title band.
items.flavor_text: The banner stays cold even in port. The pilot considers it a feature.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile banner backdrop, pale arctic blue with faint frost vein pattern and chrome accent at title band, frigid clean

items.name: Crimson Flame Banner
items.description: Profile banner: hand-painted crimson flame motif along both banner edges with a dark central panel.
items.flavor_text: The flames are painted. The attitude is not. The banner implies the pilot means it.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile banner backdrop, hand painted crimson flame motif along banner edges with dark central panel, aggressive warm

items.name: Starfield Calm Banner
items.description: Profile banner: quiet deep-navy starfield with a soft gradient from horizon glow to zenith and a thin silver title bar.
items.flavor_text: Nothing dramatic happens in this frame. That is the point. Quiet is earned.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile banner backdrop, quiet deep navy starfield with soft horizon-to-zenith gradient and thin silver title bar, contemplative

items.name: Battle Damaged Banner
items.description: Profile banner: scarred steel plating with scorch marks, field-patched rivet seams, and a faded squadron stencil corner.
items.flavor_text: Dents are data. Every scorch mark on the banner documents a pilot still breathing.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile banner backdrop, scarred steel plating with scorch marks field patched rivets and faded squadron stencil, veteran grit

items.name: Golden Ascension Banner
items.description: Profile banner: gold gradient ascending from the base with animated floating motes of light rising toward the title area.
items.flavor_text: The motes rise whether the pilot is proud or not. The banner picks both options.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile banner backdrop, gold gradient ascending from base with animated floating motes of light rising to title area, rare triumphant

items.name: Asteroid Storm Banner
items.description: Profile banner: chaotic asteroid field with slowly drifting rocks, dust veils, and sun backlight on the right edge.
items.flavor_text: The rocks are mid-decision. The pilot was here first and is still here now.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile banner backdrop, chaotic asteroid field with slowly drifting rocks dust veils and sun backlight on right edge, rare dynamic

items.name: Solar Eclipse Banner
items.description: Profile banner: dramatic solar eclipse with visible corona, slow corona flicker animation, and a deep-black disk at the center.
items.flavor_text: The sun asked the moon to block it. The moment is now permanent.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile banner backdrop, dramatic solar eclipse with visible corona and slow corona flicker animation and deep black central disk, epic celestial

items.name: Phoenix Rebirth Banner
items.description: Profile banner: animated phoenix rising from ember fields with slow-burning wing particles and a drifting gold ash trail.
items.flavor_text: The bird keeps rising. The embers keep replacing themselves. Nobody questions the logic.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile banner backdrop, animated phoenix rising from ember fields with slow burning wing particles and drifting gold ash trail, legendary mythic

items.name: Gold Trim Nameplate
items.description: Nameplate style: thin gold trim border, warm white text fill, and a subtle corner-bevel accent.
items.flavor_text: The trim is gold. Nothing else. The pilot felt the small luxury was earned.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile nameplate style, thin gold trim border with warm white text fill and subtle corner bevel, understated prestige

items.name: Crimson Text Nameplate
items.description: Nameplate style: bold crimson text on a matte-black plate with fine gold hairline border.
items.flavor_text: Red letters on black. Intent first, introduction second. The duels start quicker.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile nameplate style, bold crimson text on matte black plate with fine gold hairline border, direct aggressive

items.name: Pulsing Glow Nameplate
items.description: Nameplate style: animated soft cyan pulse glowing outward from the text every 2 seconds, with a thin dark frame.
items.flavor_text: The name pulses like an engine idle. The opponent unconsciously matches the rhythm.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile nameplate style, animated soft cyan pulse glowing outward from text every two seconds with thin dark frame, rare technical

items.name: Platinum Wing Cosmetic Variant
items.description: Prestige cosmetic variant of the Platinum Wing rank badge — engraved platinum with faint starfield etch across the wing surface.
items.flavor_text: The badge is cosmetic. The original was earned. Both show up on the profile.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile rank badge variant, engraved platinum wing with faint starfield etch across wing surface, epic prestige cosmetic

items.name: Crimson Talon Cosmetic Variant
items.description: Prestige cosmetic variant of the Crimson Talon rank badge — animated ember glow along the talon edges and slow drifting sparks.
items.flavor_text: The talon glows. Nobody asked it to. Nobody has told it to stop.
items.art_prompt_hints: profile rank badge variant, crimson talon with animated ember glow along edges and slow drifting sparks, legendary animated prestige
